name: tutorial-cowork-step
title: Cowork Step
description: Collaborative human+AI step using the cowork executor. A human and a chat agent work together in real time to produce a structured artifact. Demonstrates cowork config: agent type, systemPrompt, outputSchema, and chat model selection.

steps.name: Set Topic
steps.description: Provide the topic and constraints for the collaborative writing session.

steps.name: Write Together
steps.description: Collaborate with an AI assistant to write and refine the document through conversation.

cowork.systemPrompt: You are a writing assistant. Help the user draft and refine a document on the given topic. Use update_artifact to save the latest version after each revision. Keep the tone professional and concise.

steps.name: Final Review
steps.description: Review the finished document. Approve to publish, revise to go back to editing.
